response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience including recent AI-agent infrastructure work, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement systems — the core of this Principal/IC6 role. Current title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there is no clear evidence of large-scale multi-region distributed systems ownership or cross-team platform leadership at IC6 scope. Overlapping employment dates and inconsistent chronology also warrant clarification before advancing.
strengths: Long polyglot career across TypeScript/Node, C/C++, Java, C#, DLang with full-stack breadth
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and developer tooling — relevant to AI-first engineering velocity
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge sharing through workshops, courses, and TDD/CI/CD advocacy
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-automation platforms
No clear evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/bias-detection work at platform scale
Overlapping employment dates and unclear chronology raise resume-integrity questions; seniority signals fall short of IC6 Principal scope

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale distributed/multi-region systems track record
Broad polyglot engineering and AI-tooling exposure
